name: Mary 💕
message: Happy 26th Birthday my dear big sister 🎉❤️

name: Mary 💕
message: Today I thank God for your life and for the blessing you have been to everyone around you.

name: Mary 💕
message: You are more than a sister to me — you are my guide and someone I truly admire.

name: Bolade ❤️
message: Happy birthday to my amazing big sister ❤️

name: Bolade ❤️
message: You’ve always been my protector, my safe place, and one of the strongest people I know.

name: Olamikusibe 💖
message: Happy birthday to my first best friend and forever partner in crime 😘💕

name: Olamikusibe 💖
message: Thanks for always having my back and keeping my secrets 😂❤️
